---
title: "Community Management - the GitHub Way"
image: slides.png
image-alt: Opening page
author:
  - name: Saranjeet Kaur Bhogal
date: "2025-11-29"
categories: [Community Management, GitHub]
description: "Talk at CSCCE's Quarterly Skills Share (QSS) session, December 2025"
draft: false
---

[Slides](https://zenodo.org/records/18436389)

[![](slides.png){width="478"}](https://zenodo.org/records/18436389)

This talk was presented at [CSCCE's Quarterly Skills Share (QSS) session](https://www.cscce.org/trainings/cscce-community-manager-certification-program/quarterly-skills-share-sessions/) in December 2025.

## Abstract

In this talk, I demonstrate how GitHub can make community management tasks smoother and more efficient. I share practical examples of templates that help track and manage repetitive tasks, such as planning an event, creating a checklist for a community newsletter. Furthermore, I showcase an example of how to use GitHub Project Boards to organize your workflows. These approaches are useful for managing a small local group as well as a large online community. This session shows how GitHub can help save time, stay organized, and focus more on building meaningful connections.
